name: aps-pipeline
description: Installable Agentic Pipeline Skills bundle with the master /aps skill, phase skills, templates, and tool catalogs.

interface.shortDescription: Run the agentic pipeline with bundled MAPS assets.
interface.longDescription: APS Pipeline installs the master /aps skill plus all current MAPS/APS phase skills, templates, catalogs, and tool references. Use it to create a new agent project folder, run the phases in order, and track progress in a local .aps/progress.json file.
defaultPrompt: Use /aps to start a new agent project.
Use /aps to continue the next APS phase.
Use /aps to show my pipeline progress.
